---
title: "Analytics Group Project"
author: "Feifei Li"
date: "2026-04-13"
output: word_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## libarary
```{r}
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)
```

# Exploring the datasets
```{r}
summary(Recycling_by_category)
head(Recycling_by_category)

```
# Check for missing values
```{r}
sum(is.na(Recycling_by_category)) # Total count of missing values in the whole dataset
colSums(is.na(Recycling_by_category)) # Count of missing values per column
```
#Visualization
```{r}
hist(Recycling_by_category$`Res Tons`)
hist(Recycling_by_category$`Total Tons`)
hist(Recycling_by_category$`CII Tons`)
```
##

```{r}
summary(Waste_Management_by_Method)
head(Waste_Management_by_Method)
```
# 

```{r}
sum(is.na(Waste_Management_by_Method)) # Total count of missing values in the whole dataset
colSums(is.na(Waste_Management_by_Method)) # Count of missing values per column
```
# Q1: Are there any different recycling patterns between counties for each type of waste 
(organics, WTE, landfilled etc.) based on the waste management by method data? Are the patterns 
consistent for different types of wastes?
```{r}

# 1. Load your data
df <- read_excel("C:/Users/faith/OneDrive/Documents/Metro/MIS 380/Jin Simon/Final Project/Waste Management by Method.xlsx")
df

# 2. Calculate percentages to normalize the data
# This ensures we are comparing patterns, not just county size
df_pct <- df %>%
  mutate(Total = Recycling + Organics + Onsite + WTE + Landfilled) %>%
  mutate(across(c(Recycling, Organics, Onsite, WTE, Landfilled), ~ . / Total)) %>%
  select(County, Year, Recycling, Organics, Onsite, WTE, Landfilled)

# 3. Pivot the data to "Long" format for ggplot
df_long <- df_pct %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Recycling, Organics, Onsite, WTE, Landfilled), 
               names_to = "Method", 
               values_to = "Percentage")

# 4. Create the Boxplot
ggplot(df_long, aes(x = Method, y = Percentage, fill = Method)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.colour = "red", outlier.shape = 1) +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Waste Management Methods Across Counties",
       y = "Proportion of Total Waste",
       x = "Management Method") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent)
```
